stemHtml: ATC reports “QDM 250 degrees Class Bravo”. What does this mean?

options.a: You are on 250°M bearing to the station +/-5°.
options.b: You are on 250°M bearing to the station +/-2°.
options.c: You are approximately on 250°M bearing to the station +/-3°.
options.d: You are exactly on 250°M bearing to the station with no deviation.
